Jeanne's Dutch Apple Pie

Jeanne Marrs

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

Filling:

  • 6 c. apples
  • 1/2 c. sugar
  • 1 tsp cinnamon

Topping:

  • 1/3 c. butter
  • 1/2 c. sugar
  • 3/4 c. flour

UnBaked pie crust

Directions

  1. Combine filling ingredients.
  2. Place in unBaked pie crust.
  3. Cut butter into sugar and flour.
  4. Cover filling with topping. Bake at 400 for 40-50 min.
